name: Berry Crepes with Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the blueberries, sliced strawberries, and sugar in a small bowl; set aside.
2. To prepare the sauce, beat the cream cheese and honey until light. Slowly beat in the orange juice.
3. Spoon about half a cup of berry filling into the center of one crepe. Spoon about one tablespoon of sauce over the berries. Roll up the crepe and place on a serving plate. Repeat with remaining crepes.
4. Pour any remaining sauce over the crepes.
